checks.note: Go modernization feature is language-specific but appropriately scoped to Go codebase
All referenced CLI commands exist (go, make, golangci-lint, npm, docker)
Workstream files are concise and within limits

summary: All five workstreams for Go Modernization (F006) have been implemented and passed quality gates. The feature updates Go version consistency, adds modern linting tools, provides comprehensive code audit, improves development tooling and security scanning, and enhances integration tests and benchmarks. All acceptance criteria are satisfied, tests pass, coverage exceeds 80%, and no regression introduced.
